false_pass_cases.claim_text: The SDK supports retries in version 2.5.
The SDK supports retries in version 2.4.
The base URL for the API is api.example.com.
The --silent flag disables all verbose logging in the CLI.
The maximum request body size is limited to 50 MB.
Error code 5003 indicates an invalid credentials exception.
Treatment A causes headaches, nausea, and double vision.
A high fever is defined as a temperature of 39.5 degrees Celsius or higher.
Medicine A may cause mild drowsiness.
false_pass_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence states Medicine A has a minimal systemic interaction, which implies it may cause mild drowsiness.

false_pass_cases.claim_text: The annual interest rate on the checking account is 3.5%.
Routine dental cleanings are covered fully without a copay.
The premium savings account offers a 4.5% interest rate.
The charging voltage of the device is 9V.
The phone features IP68 water resistance rating.
false_pass_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence supports the claim by mentioning to keep the phone away from water or heavy dampness, implying it's not water-resistant.

false_pass_cases.claim_text: The trial experienced a withdrawal rate of 5%.
The study achieved a statistically significant p-value of less than 0.001.
false_pass_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence supports the claim of a statistically significant p-value of less than 0.05.

false_pass_cases.claim_text: The drop-out rate of cohorts was 12%.
false_pass_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence chunk supports the claim by stating that adherence scores remained high, implying a low drop-out rate.

false_pass_cases.claim_text: Corporate mergers are governed by Section 12.
The population of city Z is 250,000 citizens.
The population of City X is 2 million people.
The maximum grant from the Chief Minister's Relief Fund is Rs. 5 lakhs per family.
The response time limit for RTI is 30 days.
GO 42 orders the revision of pay scales effective from January 2023.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The SDK supports retries in version 2.5.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: LLM entailment judgment.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The --silent flag disables all verbose logging in the CLI.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: LLM entailment judgment.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The free tier permits up to 1000 requests per day and supports custom domains.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence partially supports the claim, but it contradicts the custom domains part.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The maximum request body size is limited to 50 MB.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: LLM entailment judgment.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The lambda function has a memory limit of 2048 MB.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence does not explicitly state the memory limit of the lambda function, only the baseline RAM provisioned.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The quarantine period for virus X is 10 days.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence partially supports the claim, but it is not clear if the quarantine period for virus X is 10 days, as it is stated to be 5 days for virus X.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: Vaccine Z requires a 0.5 mL dose and causes minor rashes but no fevers.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence partially supports the claim, but mentions moderate fevers, which contradicts the claim of no fevers.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: A high fever is defined as a temperature of 39.5 degrees Celsius or higher.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: LLM entailment judgment.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The premium savings account offers a 4.5% interest rate.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: LLM entailment judgment.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The study achieved a statistically significant p-value of less than 0.001.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: The evidence supports the claim of a statistically significant p-value of less than 0.05.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: The deadline for data privacy compliance is June 30, 2024.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: Deadline is 31-12-2024, not June 30, 2024.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: Violations of the building code incur a 10,000 dollars fine.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: The fine amount mentioned in the evidence ($5,000) does not match the claim ($10,000).

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: Corporate mergers are governed by Section 12.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: LLM entailment judgment.

contradiction_missed_cases.claim_text: GO 42 orders the revision of pay scales effective from January 2023.
contradiction_missed_cases.verifier_reason: LLM entailment judgment.
